name: Scalloped Potatoes-joni's Oldie
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Cooked Ham, diced or strips (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Arrange a layer of potatoes in a greased 2-quart baking dish.
3. Cover with onions and sprinkle some of the combined flour, salt, pepper, and curry powder (if using) on top.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used up, ending with dollops of butter on top.
6. Pour scalded milk over everything.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover and bake in a moderately hot oven for 45 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes or until tender.
Makes 4 servings. Variations:
1. Add 1/4 teaspoon curry powder to the flour mixture.
2. Add diced or strips of cooked ham, layering with potatoes and onions (about 2 cups).
3. Add grated cheddar or sharp cheese, layering with potatoes (and optionally ham).
